ques: Identify a Specialization on Coursera that offers an overview of 'Renewable Energy'. The Specialization should be beginner-level and include a course on Renewable Energy Futures. Note the instructor's name and the number of weeks required to complete the course if I spend 5 hours a week.
answer: The "Renewable Energy" Specialization (University of Colorado Boulder) is beginner-level and includes the "Renewable Energy Futures" course. Its instructor is Paul Komor; at 5 hours per week the course takes 2 weeks to complete (≈10 hours total).
